posts.author: marciosato (Marcio Yoshinori Sato)
posts.cookedHtml:
video revision802×1441 104 KB

Hello, it’s possible to group updates from video review in the same post ? And if another person comment after that put on another post. (take post/review by user/time)

Because if i had many comments the post at update shows one by one (like the photo).

Sorry for my bad english
